title: App skeleton, credential configuration, and sources integration
description: Non-runnable container bead. Orchestrates all scaffolding, credential layer, networking, UI tabs, and test work for the initial iOS app skeleton defined in spec-3da083df.
acceptance_criteria: xcodegen generate exits 0 with no warnings about missing source paths
xcodebuild test exits 0; all three unit tests pass
App launches in the simulator showing a Liquid Glass floating tab bar: Threads, Sources, Today, Settings in that order
Threads and Today tabs show ContentUnavailableView with 'Coming soon'
Settings tab pre-fills Base URL to https://aggregator-api.renaliaslabs.net/api/v1
Sources tab shows 'Not configured' ContentUnavailableView when credentials are absent
Sources tab shows glass-backed list rows when credentials are present
No Client ID or Client Secret stored outside Keychain (not in source files, Info.plist, or UserDefaults)
